retry_reason: The put operation never fails; retrying would cause a double-put (use-after-free risk).
contract_summary: Put wrapper for BTF reference: decrements the reference count of the BTF object associated with the file. The caller (VFS) invokes this when the file descriptor is closed. After this call, the private_data pointer must not be used, and the caller must not perform any further operations on the released file.

judge.reason: The sole purpose of the function is to call btf_put on the file's private data, which decrements the BTF object's reference count. No other logic is performed.

check.reason: btf_put is called on filp->private_data, which is the object whose refcount is decremented.
